extracted.title: Bobcat Storage Conditions for 1/19/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Bobcat Gas Storage (Bobcat) system for Gas Day January 19, 2026:

Bobcat has restricted a portion of excess withdrawals. No increases in withdrawals will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Bobcat has scheduled and sealed withdrawal nominations and IWS activity at meter 45409 - ANR - STORAGE (R-INJ 40409/D-WTD 40410). No increases in withdrawals or IWS activity will be accepted to meter 45409 - ANR - STORAGE (R-INJ 40409/D-WTD 40410) except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
